channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-16
item.description:
The open-source research community has seen exciting progress recently, with notable updates in the **giladfeldman/docpluck** project. The latest version, 2.4.90, introduces a significant new feature: "per-band region-aware two-column re-extraction", which demonstrates the project's ongoing commitment to innovation. This update is particularly noteworthy as it builds upon previous fixes, such as the recovery of dropped-minus coefficients from the layout channel in version 2.4.89. The project's dedication to thorough documentation is also commendable, with multiple updates providing valuable insights into the development process. As the community continues to collaborate and share knowledge, we can expect to see even more impressive advancements in the future. By connecting projects like **giladfeldman/docpluck** with other open-source research tools, we can unlock new possibilities for scientific discovery and progress.

84 commits across 5 active repositories this week.

New releases: metacheck v0.1.0-beta

Most active:

metacheck32 commits
docpluck21 commits
regcheck19 commits
coarse11 commits
auto-zcurve1 commits

item.title: metacheck: 6 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `main` branch was updated with a merge from the `dev` branch via pull request #312. Work was done on the `dev` branch to add a "zenodo citation", as stated in the commit message. The `dev` branch also received an update to "apps and docs", according to the commit message. Additionally, the `dev` branch was updated with a merge from the `main` branch via pull request #310, and then merged into the `main` branch. The `main` branch was also updated with a merge from the `dev` branch via pull request #311.

6 commit(s) today:

  • a7dea29 [main] Merge pull request #312 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine
  • f09fb47 [dev] zenodo citation — Lisa DeBruine
  • 00eaa3b [main] Merge pull request #311 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine
  • 767da17 [dev] update apps and docs — Lisa DeBruine
  • 9d012e7 [dev] Merge pull request #310 from nielsvanberkel/main — Lisa DeBruine
  • 8a605a3 [dev] Merge branch 'dev' into main — Lisa DeBruine
  • 3e127fa [dev] Replace devtools::install_github with pak::pkg_install — nielsvanberkel
  • 9ef4d94 [prereg_regcheck] name fix — Lakens
  • 2b0b4e4 [prereg_regcheck] working version of Regcheck — Lakens
  • 9a007d9 [dev] TUE server uses 0.9.0 GROBID now as well — Lakens
  • 920c2d9 [dev] Add vignette describing all references — Lakens
  • 97bb1c1 [dev] stat_effect_size: detect tests via extract_eq(); add implied sample sizes (#308) — Lakens
  • f495921 [dev] clean up website — Lisa DeBruine
  • a6c4cd3 [dev] mocking updates — Lisa DeBruine
  • d85d73f [dev] Add TUE grobid server — Lisa DeBruine
  • 2b22472 [prereg_regcheck] Align reg_check module style with the other modules — Lakens
  • d6e221d [prereg_regcheck] Fix regcheck multipart dimensions format (JSON array, not CSV) — Lakens
  • 7be3aa2 [prereg_regcheck] Add reg_check module: RegCheck preregistration-paper comparison — Lakens
  • fe37300 [dev] add email — Lakens
  • f0f26ef [dev] Shiny app updates and related fixes — Lisa DeBruine

View all commits →

item.title: docpluck: 11 commits today
item.description:
giladfeldman/docpluck

The main branch was the only branch worked on, with various commits adding and modifying features, fixes, and documentation. A new feature was added, "per-band region-aware two-column re-extraction" as part of version 2.4.90, with the commit message stating "RC-1 Step 2 -- per-band region-aware two-column re-extraction (ship-dark)". The documentation was updated multiple times, including adding "handoff — RC-1 Step 2 first cut shipped (v2.4.90, ship-dark)" and "cycle-2 learnings — RC-1 Step 2 + word-preservation-guard-is-the-safety", as well as "cycle-1 B7 (v2.4.89) learnings + lessons + resume handoff + TRIAGE". A fix was also implemented to "recover dropped-minus coefficients from the layout channel" in version 2.4.89, and a test was added to "assert audit input PDF byte-equal to pinned feed (R-0003)". Additionally, the code was refactored to "remove orphaned duplicate band re-extractor" in the extract_columns function.

11 commit(s) today:

  • 4c55d6e [main] docs(iterate): 2026-06-16 resume handoff + concurrency-collision lesson — Gilad Feldman
  • 436fc5a [main] refactor(extract_columns): remove orphaned duplicate band re-extractor — Gilad Feldman

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 2 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The staging branch was the focus of the recent work, with the first commit updating the model requirements. As stated in the commit message, the model requirements were specifically "update[d]" by Jamie Cummins. In the second commit on the staging branch, report viewing was "improve[d]" and quality of life (QOL) features were added. The commit messages do not provide further details on the specific changes made to the model requirements or the QOL features. The staging branch is the only branch that was worked on in these commits. The changes made by Jamie Cummins were limited to these two updates on the staging branch.

2 commit(s) today:

  • 9074b4b [staging] update model reqs — Jamie Cummins
  • 76b8a02 [staging] improve report viewing + qol features — Jamie Cummins
  • a90ee3f [staging] improve report UI flow + UX — Jamie Cummins
  • 9240258 [staging] improve aesthetics, report navigation — Jamie Cummins
  • 395a038 [staging] improve report naming — Jamie Cummins
  • bf01cf6 [staging] improve security and sharing of reports — Jamie Cummins
  • 608907d [staging] add profile memory + report editing — Jamie Cummins
  • 670547e [staging] first pass at oauth implementation — Jamie Cummins
  • bcd1fe9 [staging] reformat footer — Jamie Cummins
  • a14ee5b [staging] add dimension fixes — Jamie Cummins
  • 9d12737 [staging] add more robust quote location — Jamie Cummins
  • 3ace417 [staging] merge report formats — Jamie Cummins
  • 00cc087 [staging] Revert "checkpoint: redesign of report page" — Jamie Cummins
  • c3bf9da [staging] update of report — Jamie Cummins
  • dc0a1e6 [staging] checkpoint: redesign of report page — Jamie Cummins
  • c8cc364 [staging] remove footer + modify aesthetics — Jamie Cummins
  • 2b3fe67 [staging] add panelling variation — Jamie Cummins
  • 3a0f1fc [staging] update colour palette — Jamie Cummins
  • b5bda77 [staging] add redesign — Jamie Cummins
  • bdb961d [main] update api (straight to prod :-) ) — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
